title: Algorithmic Trading Strategy
scenario: Create a prompt for an LLM to generate a high-quality algorithmic trading strategy based on a given set of market conditions and trading rules. The prompt should take the market conditions and trading rules as input and output a well-documented trading strategy as a Python code snippet.
constraints: Must include a clear explanation of the trading strategy

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt adheres to the word limit and includes a clear explanation of the trading strategy.
Check if the generated trading strategy accurately reflects the given market conditions and trading rules.
Check if the generated code is well-formatted and easy to read.
